prompt: Generate a world map showing the natural habitats of each animal. Place the images near their native regions and connect them with markers.
prompt_refined: Generate a detailed information graphic featuring a world map. On this map, clearly delineate the natural habitat regions for various animals. Place the iconic-style animal illustration from image 1 (tiger) precisely over its primary native regions in Asia, such as India and Southeast Asia. Position the iconic-style animal illustration from image 2 (penguin) accurately over its native regions around Antarctica and the Southern Hemisphere. Similarly, place the iconic-style animal illustration from image 3 (elephant) over its native regions in Africa and parts of Asia. Each animal illustration should be directly linked to its respective habitat area on the map by a distinct visual marker, such as a pointer or a labeled line, clearly indicating its natural distribution. The final image should have a clean, educational infographic aesthetic.
objects: Iconic-style tiger illustration placed over Asia
Iconic-style penguin illustration placed over Antarctica and the Southern Hemisphere
Iconic-style elephant illustration placed over Africa and parts of Asia
Visual markers (pointers or labeled lines) linking animal illustrations to their respective habitat areas
